headline: Sentiment down 44% this week, fears declining
key_insights: Frustrations trending down 57% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 133 quotes and an overwhelming 118 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• At 68.2, frustration levels remain well above the typical range but below the period's peak of 156.9.

• Fears rebounded significantly from yesterday's very low point, while optimism stayed deeply negative despite a small uptick.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
